entries.title: One-click install badges + auto-recency block + version-drift hint
entries.summary: Top-of-fold UX wins (todo.md items #1, #2). Three additive surfaces, zero behaviour change to existing tools.

entries.title: Docs: Codex CLI install workaround
entries.summary: - **README — Codex CLI config block rewritten** to lead with the pre-installed-binary install pattern instead of `uvx`. Closes the loop on the paying-client report that drove v1.82.1's handshake watchdog: the watchdog correctly stays silent under the venv install,

entries.title: Reference-tool response shapes carry line numbers + flat import aliases
entries.summary: - **`find_references` matches now carry `line`** — each entry in `references[i].matches[j]` includes the 1-based line number of the import statement that introduced the reference. Lets harvesters and IDE deeplinks jump straight to the import site instead of opening the
